outlook_paragraph: CRGY's drilling activity shows moderate expansion with a 50% increase in relative activity and two newly active sites identified via satellite, indicating early-stage production ramp-up. The company's operations represent only 20% of its parent segment, limiting full exposure to the favorable WTI environment averaging $84.84/bbl. Despite solid drilling momentum, realized prices remain below benchmark due to regional differentials. The deterministic revenue forecast for the June 2022 quarter is approximately $561.3 million.
